notes: Authored from the Flutterwave v4 (Flutterwave for Business) API docs. Adaptor calls three endpoints confirmed from the compiled dist: POST /customers (createCustomer), POST /payment-methods (createPaymentMethod), POST /charges (initiatePayment). baseUrl is supplied via adaptor configuration; servers[] lists the v4 sandbox and production hosts. GET/list operations added so Customer/PaymentMethod/Charge seed as collections. Responses use the v4 { status, message, data } envelope; field details are representative, not exhaustively validated against the live reference.
